overview: Mistral Small 3.2 is a large language model from Mistral AI, part of the Mistral Small line. Released 2025-06-20. Compact open-weight line for low-latency, locally deployable general use.
What's notable in this version: 24B refresh improving instruction adherence and reliability; Apache 2.0.
